tools.name: sync_status
tools.description: Show rule coverage per feature — greps specs for RULE-N, reads *.proofs-*.json, diffs them. Returns coverage report with actionable → directives.

tools.name: purlin_config
tools.description: Read or update Purlin configuration from .purlin/config.json.

tools.name: drift
tools.description: Structured drift summary since last verification. Returns JSON with commits, categorized files, spec changes, and proof status.
